AS SEEN IN
We're on a Mission to Change the
Financial Planning Industry.
Did You Know...
Many financial advisors work inside a system that incentivizes them to put your needs second - even if they are "fiduciaries" or "fee-only".
Financial service companies can limit their advice to what makes them money, such as high-commission insurance products or annuities, and may not help you with the important guidance you need.
Many financial advisors will only work with you when you have a minimum amount to invest. They also require you to move your accounts to a place where they can manage them, and bill you each month for management fees.
Over time, even a small management fee eats away at your life savings, generating lower investment returns in the long run.
What Makes Abundo Different?
We believe the best way to help you achieve your financial goals is without high fees or conflicts of interest.
Advice on Everything. Rather than focusing our advice on just investments or insurance, we advise you on everything related to your ability to earn, save, or spend money.
Keep Control of Your Money. You’ll always be in control of your own investments. We teach you how to invest for your unique situation and empower you to know why you’re investing for your future.
Low, Transparent Pricing. You never have to worry about hidden fees and you’ll know exactly how much you are paying. The only fee we receive from you is your low, monthly subscription payment.
Learn More
Everyone deserves high-quality advice, transparent pricing, and low-cost investing.
Work with a
Trusted Partner
With Abundo, you have a dedicated advisor and a personalized one-on-one relationship. This trusted advisor is readily available for consultations through virtual meetings and emails. All of our advisors are prepared to give you expert, customized guidance designed to meet your specific needs.
Build a Plan
You Love
Together we'll identify your goals and what you're hoping to accomplish financially. We'll create a detailed action plan with easy to follow steps to help improve your chances of success. We will help simplify your finances to reduce uncertainty and stress which will make planning for your future fun!
Always Feel
Supported
Be a part of the Abundo family, where our team is here to guide you through all of life's uncertainties. We understand life comes with lots of ups and downs. Whether it's job changes, market uncertainty, or unexpected expenses, we are always here to provide direction so you can make the best decisions.
Get Started
Join the thousands of individuals and families across the country who have trusted us for ongoing financial advice.
Abundo changed the way I understood and managed my finances, in a very significant way. This team is down to earth, brilliant in what they do, very accessible and a game changer in this industry. HIGHLY recommend.
Molly J.
If you want personal attention from people who actually care about you and your finances, and who care about charging a reasonable rate for the work they do, then there’s no reason to look elsewhere!
Aubrey J.
Very happy I chose Abundo as our financial advisor. Their fees are fair, easy to understand and transparent. They embrace technology and everything is integrated and easy to use. Looking forward to working with long term.
Luke H.
These testimonials were provided by current Abundo Wealth clients and may not be representative of the experiences of other clients. The clients were not compensated, nor are there material conflicts of interest that would affect the given testimonials.
